series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including company and project correspondence, concrete mix designs, Prestressed/precast Concrete Institute Plant certification reports, personnel qualifications, initial plant inspection, plant Quality Aassurance inspection reports, inspectors worksheets, shop drawings, fabricator approval, and fabricator rating. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS. then, CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: on electronic shared database (Site Manager) and scanned images on internal shared drive ; Paper: paper scanned
